posts.author: HardcoreGR (Manos)
posts.cookedHtml:
There should be an option to add a .doc inside Projects’ Main table.

  • Not outside the projects in root folder, but inside a project.
  • We should be able to add docs inside:
    A) Main Table tab
    B) Project Documents tab.

You are being advertised as the most modern and multi-functional Project Management tool.
This is a very basic feature that all Project Management tools have.

There is no point supporting only excel files in Project Documents.
We want to be able to work fast and efficient. Docs should exist since day 1 there. Having them “Outside projects, in a folder in root” is of no use. It’s an extra huge scroll, double folders for all projects and micromanagement.
